channel.title: Cosmos on Abhinav Srivastava / @abhinavmir
channel.description: Recent content in Cosmos on Abhinav Srivastava / @abhinavmir

item.title: Install Gaia, Initiate two local chains and transact across chains
item.description: Install GoLang wget -c https://dl.google.com/go/go1.14.2.linux-amd64.tar.gz -O - | sudo tar -xz -C /usr/local Add export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin to ~/.profile (You can access it by typing in gedit ~/.profile). Run source ~/,profile. You should have GoLang by now. Install GoLang git clone https://github.com/cosmos/gaia && cd gaia && make install You now should have gaiad available on your command line. (NOTE: gaiad and gaiacli are the same thing since recent releases). Set up relayer git clone https://github.
